title: Person Matching Requests
description: Information about new person requests that are processed through duplicate prevention matching rules.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the person matching request.

person.title: Person
person.description: The new or matched person record.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Person.

outcomes.title: Outcomes
outcomes.description: The outcome of the person matching request.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of outcome (initial or final).

status.title: Status
status.description: The outcome status of the person matching request.

date.title: Date
date.description: The date and time associated with the status of the person matching request.

originator.title: Originator
originator.description: The originator (user or system) of the person matching request.
